lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require significant repair. The exterior has extensive damage including rust and dents, and the interior shows heavy wear and staining. Several mechanical components are currently non-functional.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage. It is in perfect mechanical condition and has been fully maintained.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior body is straight and the paint retains a healthy shine, though there are minor cosmetic imperfections including small stone chips on the front bumper and a few light surface scratches. Mechanically, the car is sound and drives well, with a complete service history available for review. The interior is clean and smoke-free, showing only light wear on the driver's seat bolster and floor mats. All electronics and climate control systems are fully functional, making this a reliable and well-presented option for its next owner.
Fair condition.

Looking for perfection? This incredible vehicle is in mint condition and looks like it just left the showroom! It has been meticulously cared for and is absolutely flawless inside and out. If you’re looking for a top-tier ride that feels brand new, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in exceptional, mint condition and presents exactly as it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, completely free of any chips, scratches, or imperfections, and maintains a deep, brilliant luster. Inside, the cabin is pristine, with no signs of wear on the upholstery, dashboard, or controls; it even retains that new-car scent. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service history. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control, functions flawlessly. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle of this caliber that has been stored in a climate-controlled environment and treated with the utmost care. A buyer can expect a vehicle that requires absolutely no immediate attention and offers a like-new driving experience.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. For the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking an uncompromising driving experience, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unparalleled integrity.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it drives like a total dream. You won’t find a single scratch or hiccup here. Come take it for a spin, I promise you’ll fall in love instantly! ✨
Offered is a museum-grade 1994 Mazda RX-7 (FD3S) in pristine, collector-quality condition. This example
Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero scratches. Full service history included. Low mileage. Runs perfectly.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior finish retains its original deep luster, entirely free from swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in an untouched state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no signs of wear, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. It drives with the tightness and precision of a brand-new vehicle. Included are all original keys, manuals, and a documented history of its pampered life. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that defies its age and looks exactly as it did on the showroom floor.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained in superlative condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, offering an uncompromising aesthetic and mechanical profile that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every surface and component reflects a rigorous standard of preservation, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut.

Presenting a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an uncompromising level of preservation that defies its tenure. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior appointment reflects a standard of care synonymous with a private collection. For the discerning buyer seeking an automotive investment that transcends the standard pre-owned market, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to acquire excellence in its purest form.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape that it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor—it’s practically perfect inside and out! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it really shows in every little detail. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and looks stunning, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!

Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. All maintenance records available.

This vehicle is the definition of a time capsule, preserved in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating that makes the paint pop under any light. Step inside to an interior that still carries that new-car aroma; the premium leather seats show absolutely no bolster wear, and the dashboard is free of even the slightest dust or sun damage. Every button, switch, and electronic feature operates with tactile precision. Mechanically, it is flawless, having been meticulously maintained with a full, documented service history and kept in a climate-controlled garage since day one. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly immaculate example that drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

We are proud to present this superlative example of automotive excellence. Preserved in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle has been meticulously curated to satisfy the most demanding standards of quality and performance. Its flawless presentation and mechanical integrity offer an unrivaled ownership experience for the discerning individual seeking a truly pristine acquisition.

We are proud to present this motorcar in truly pristine condition. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, this vehicle exhibits no signs of wear, offering a showroom-quality aesthetic and mechanical excellence. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior paint, reflects an uncompromising commitment to preservation. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that remains in its peak factory state, suitable for the most discerning collector.

Hey everyone! I’m so excited to share this absolute gem with you. It’s in truly pristine condition—honestly, it feels and looks just like it did the day it was first bought! I’ve babied this car from day one, so it’s spotless inside and out and drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically perfect, this is the one for you!

Offered is a museum-grade specimen of the legendary E46 platform, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS variable valve timing. This example boasts a pristine, reinforced subframe and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, supported by factory-spec dampers and staggered forged Style 67 wheels. Power delivery is linear and telepathic, channeled through a variable M-differential lock. With zero oxidation on the undercarriage and a flawless interior, this is a turn-key collector-grade vehicle for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Low mileage. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

This is a rare opportunity to own a true time-capsule vehicle in museum-quality condition. Every inch of the exterior gleams with a deep, mirror-like finish, protected by a professional ceramic coating and free from even the smallest stone chips or door dings. The factory alloy wheels are absolutely pristine, wrapped in fresh, high-performance rubber. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no visible wear on the bolsters, and the interior retains that distinct 'new car' fragrance. All technological features, from the navigation system to the premium audio, operate with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a meticulous service history exclusively performed at authorized dealerships. The engine bay is impeccably clean, and the drive is as tight and responsive as the day it rolled off the assembly line. Always garage-kept and pampered by a single enthusiast owner, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class for the most discerning collector.

We are pleased to present this exemplary automotive specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, representing the pinnacle of its class. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a history of meticulous preservation, ensuring an ownership experience that satisfies the most discerning requirements. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand excellence without exception.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits showroom-grade aesthetics and peerless mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Every surface and component reflects a meticulous history of care, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery state.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this beauty – it’s honestly in such amazing shape, it feels like it just left the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically perfect and ready for a new home, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3, a masterclass in atmospheric performance. Powered by the S54B32 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing, this unit delivers linear power up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal torque distribution. This example is mechanically pristine, featuring documented rod bearing replacement and comprehensive subframe reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity. The suspension remains tight, utilizing original geometry for telepathic handling. Showroom-quality exterior and an immaculate cabin reflect its fastidious ownership history. A turn-key collector piece for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Original paint. Full service history. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of pre-owned excellence, presenting in a state that is virtually indistinguishable from new. The exterior paint retains a deep, glass-like luster, free of any stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections, and has been professionally ceramic coated for lasting protection. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of pristine materials; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and taut without a single crease, and the high-resolution displays are crystal clear. Every mechanical component has been meticulously cared for, with a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by master technicians. Garage-kept since day one and never driven in inclement weather, this car features a spotless undercarriage and alloy wheels that are entirely devoid of curb rash. For the buyer who demands perfection and a 'showroom-floor' experience, this vehicle is a rare find that exceeds every expectation.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the most exacting standards. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior and a meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our uncompromising criteria for excellence. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of peerless integrity.
